message.howlingmoonrising.curse_awakened: Your blood boils... THE CURSE HAS AWAKENED!
message.howlingmoonrising.full_moon: ☾ The full moon rises... the beast takes control!
message.howlingmoonrising.moon_sets: The moon sets... you return to yourself.
message.howlingmoonrising.bite_strange: [⚠] The wolf's bite feels strange... your veins burn.
message.howlingmoonrising.pearl_resonate: ✨ The Moon Pearl resonates... your path forward is clear!
message.howlingmoonrising.human_blood: The potion has no effect on your human blood.
message.howlingmoonrising.purifies_blood: The wolfsbane purifies your blood... the curse has been lifted.
message.howlingmoonrising.debug_moon_for: The full moon forces you to remain a beast!
message.howlingmoonrising.will_not_rest: The beast within will not rest...
